violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of both dairy cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
An accumulation of debris was observed by the refuse area. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

Employee restroom was observed with water leaking from base of toilet. PIC put in service ticket. Restroom was taken out of service and to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2023
